nodes.name: Chamaetylas
nodes.summary: Chamaetylas（Chamaetylas）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联4种鸟类，如Brown-chested alethe、Red-throated alethe、Thyolo alethe等4种鸟类。

nodes.name: White-chested alethe
nodes.summary: White-chested alethe（Chamaetylas fuelleborni）是图谱中的分类级分类节点，当前关联1种鸟类，如White-chested alethe。

nodes.name: White-chested alethe
nodes.summary: The white-chested alethe (Chamaetylas fuelleborni) is a species of bird in the family Muscicapidae. It is found in Malawi, Mozambique, Tanzania, and Zambia. Its natural habitat is subtropical or tropical moist lowland forests. The binomial of the bird commemorates the German physician Friedrich Fülleborn. References
